i: Fixed question from 'What does pozornost mean in Czech?' to 'What does pozornost mean?'; replaced near-synonym distractors (awareness, observation, focus, concentration, notice, watchfulness, vigilance, carefulness — all too similar to attention) with antonym/contrast nouns

Fixed question from 'What does trávit čas mean in English?' to 'What does trávit čas mean?'; replaced distractors (to waste time, to pass by, to travel, to move forward, to walk around, to go away, to leave, to run out — some unrelated to time) with time-related idiomatic phrases
Fixed distractors: replaced placeholder garbage (different, another, other, variant, choice, version) with nouns contrasting fun/entertainment; expanded to 8 distractors
Fixed distractors: replaced placeholder garbage (variant option, choice option, version option) with nouns contrasting happiness/luck; expanded to 8 distractors
